summary: V1.1.12 Refraction Engine Unification & Black Hills Binding - ALL TESTS PASS. Verified: (1) Tesseract Vault renders with data-testid='tesseract-vault', canvas has non-zero size (1920x1080), WebGL context active; (2) Procedural platonic solid gems visible (no 2D img placeholders) - multi-colored icosahedron/octahedron/dodecahedron shapes matching DEFAULT_RELICS colors; (3) Black Hills basin floor mounted inside Tesseract with 'DEEPEST · 150ft' label visible; (4) Evolution Lab Refraction Engine still works - data-testid='evo-refraction-engine' and 'evo-gem-stage-3d' present, canvas mounts (1846x218), specimen card selection changes gem, Polish button triggers reaction line; (5) /forgotten-languages loads without crash; (6) /pricing loads with 4-tier grid and Founder hero.
critical_code_review_comments: RefractionGem.jsx correctly implements unified procedural-PHI gem primitive with solidForId() hash function for deterministic shape selection
TesseractVault.js correctly imports and uses RefractionGem with tier→stage mapping (sovereign→transcendental, architect→refined, all→raw)
BlackHillsBathymetry.js exports BasinMesh as named export (line 292), correctly mounted in TesseractVault at position [0,-1.05,0] scale [0.72,0.55,0.72]
EvolutionGemStage3D.jsx correctly wraps RefractionGem in Canvas with Float/OrbitControls, uses SOLID_FOR_CRYSTAL_SYSTEM mapping
SovereignMath.js exports PHI/PHI_INV constants used by RefractionGem for idle bob frequency and pulse curves
seed_data_creation: None - used existing relic catalogue (8 Hawaiian Imports) and specimen collection (3 specimens: moonstone, pearl, lapis lazuli)
context_for_next_testing_agent: V1.1.12 Refraction Engine unification complete. Key verifications: (1) Tesseract Vault at /vault renders procedural 3D gems using shared RefractionGem primitive - no 2D placeholders, gems are platonic solids (icosahedron/octahedron/dodecahedron) with colors from DEFAULT_RELICS; (2) Black Hills Pactola Reservoir basin is mounted as floor inside Tesseract canvas with 'DEEPEST · 150ft' depth marker visible; (3) Evolution Lab at /evolution-lab uses same RefractionGem primitive - canvas mounts, specimen selection works, Polish/Refine/Awaken interactions trigger reaction line; (4) Relic selection in Vault requires clicking directly on 3D mesh (raycasting) - Playwright canvas clicks may not trigger detail panel due to precise hit detection; (5) Vault slot quota shows '0/2 SLOTS' for test account; (6) /forgotten-languages and /pricing load without crash. Test account has 3 specimens in Evolution Lab.

features_verified.gem_colors_match_relics: PASS - Multi-colored gems visible (yellow/lilikoi, pink/lychee, brown/koa-wood, etc.)
features_verified.black_hills_basin_floor: PASS - 'DEEPEST' and '150ft' text found in DOM
features_verified.evolution_lab_specimen_selection: PASS - 3 specimen cards found, clicking changes gem
features_verified.evolution_lab_polish_interaction: PASS - Reaction line shows '+5 XP' with mantra
features_verified.forgotten_languages_smoke: PASS - Page loads without crash, 0 error elements
features_verified.pricing_page_smoke: PASS - 4 tier cards found, Founder hero visible, Policy block visible
